name: Iván Nova
transactions: July 15, 2004:Signed by theNew York Yankeesas an amateur free agent.
December 11, 2008:Drafted by theSan Diego Padresfrom theNew York Yankeesin the 2008 rule 5 draft.
March 29, 2009:Returned (earlier draft pick) by theSan Diego Padresto theNew York Yankees.

August 1, 2016:Traded by theNew York Yankeesto thePittsburgh Piratesfor players to be named later. ThePittsburgh PiratessentTito Polo(minors) (August 30, 2016) andStephen Tarpley(August 30, 2016) to theNew York Yankeesto complete the trade.
December 27, 2016:Signed as a Free Agent with thePittsburgh Pirates.
December 11, 2018:Traded by thePittsburgh Piratesto theChicago White SoxforYordi Rosario(minors) and international bonus slot money.
January 13, 2020:Signed as a Free Agent with theDetroit Tigers.
January 29, 2021:Signed as a Free Agent with thePhiladelphia Phillies.
April 12, 2021:Signed as a Free Agent with theColorado Rockies.
